name: @microverse.ts/sorting-lab
description: Browser sorting algorithm lab: compare two Lua sorts step-by-step via Microverse Wasm.

scripts.codegen: microverse codegen --surface src/engine/sortingSurface.ts --header-note "LuaLS stubs for lua/*.lua — use SortingAlgorithm:extend() and self.bridges.*." && tsx src/generateScriptCatalogDefs.ts
scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/microverse-lua run build && pnpm run codegen
